title: centaurea heterocarpa
intro: Centaurea heterocarpa, also known as bitter knapweed, is a perennial plant native to Western North America, characterized by its bitter-tasting flowers and leaves. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Centaurea heterocarpa include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and support immune function. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat various ailments, including digestive issues, fever, and skin conditions.
